2605.08198.title: FairHealth: An Open-Source Python Library for Trustworthy Healthcare AI in Low-Resource Settings
2605.08198.paper_summary: We present FairHealth, an open-source Python library that provides a unified, modular framework for trustworthy machine learning in healthcare applications, with particular focus on low-resource and low-income country (LMIC) settings such as Bangladesh. FairHealth addresses four critical gaps in existing healthcare AI toolkits: (1) the absence of integrated fairness auditing for biosignals and clinical tabular data; (2) the lack of privacy-preserving federated learning tools compatible with standard ML workflows; (3) missing explainability tools tailored for low-bandwidth clinical decision support; and (4) no existing toolkit covering Global South healthcare datasets. Built from five peer-reviewed research contributions, FairHealth provides six modules covering federated learning with homomorphic encryption (fairhealth.federated), intersectional fairness metrics (fairhealth.fairness), hybrid fuzzy-SHAP explainability (fairhealth.explain), multilingual dengue triage (fairhealth.lowresource), equitable disaster aid allocation (fairhealth.equity), and public dataset loaders (fairhealth.datasets). All datasets used are publicly available without institutional data use agreements. FairHealth is installable via pip install fairhealth(PyPI: pypi.org/project/fairhealth/) and available at https://github.com/Farjana-Yesmin/fairhealth.
2605.08198.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 FairHealth，一個開源的 Python 函式庫，提供一個統一的模組化框架，以實現醫療應用中的可信機器學習，特別專注於如孟加拉國等低資源和低收入國家 (LMIC) 的環境。FairHealth 解決了現有醫療 AI 工具包中的四個關鍵缺口：(1) 缺乏對生物信號和臨床表格數據的整合公平性審計；(2) 缺乏與標準機器學習工作流程相容的隱私保護聯邦學習工具；(3) 缺少為低帶寬臨床決策支持量身定制的可解釋性工具；以及 (4) 沒有涵蓋全球南方醫療數據集的現有工具包。FairHealth 基於五項經過同行評審的研究貢獻，提供六個模組，涵蓋帶同態加密的聯邦學習 (fairhealth.federated)、交叉公平性指標 (fairhealth.fairness)、混合模糊-SHAP 可解釋性 (fairhealth.explain)、多語言登革熱分診 (fairhealth.lowresource)、公平的災難援助分配 (fairhealth.equity) 以及公共數據集加載器 (fairhealth.datasets)。所有使用的數據集均可公開獲得，無需機構數據使用協議。FairHealth 可以通過 pip install fairhealth 安裝 (PyPI: pypi.org/project/fairhealth/)，並可在 https://github.com/Farjana-Yesmin/fairhealth 獲得。
2605.08198.author: Farjana Yesmin et.al.
